acuity-middleware / @tummycrypt/scheduling-bridge owns Acuity automation.

Authoritative boundary:
- Owns Acuity service/date/slot/booking automation semantics.
- Owns the remote bridge protocol and Modal runtime behavior.
- Does not own the homegrown backend or adopter-specific payment policy.

Critical anti-duplication rules:
- Do not let adopter apps redefine Acuity flow semantics.
- Do not let Bazel metadata drift from package metadata.
- Make runtime release truth visible enough for downstream rollout checks.

Current reset state:
- Package version is `0.3.1`.
- Bazel metadata was aligned back to `0.3.1`.
- Modal deployment is still separate from app deploy and must become part of a
  truthful release tuple.
